items.name: Silent-Crypto-Miner
items.description: Silent Crypto Miner is an advanced cryptocurrency mining builder and runtime engine with multi-algorithm CPU/GPU support and intelligent resource management. Create custom mining executables with configurable algorithms, cross-platform output, real-time monitoring, session persistence, thermal throttling, scheduling, and hashrate optimization.

items.name: Hades-II-Trainer
items.description: 🛡️ Hades-II-Trainer is a powerful trainer for Hades II that lets you customize your gameplay experience. Features include God Mode, infinite health, unlimited mana, one-hit kill, speed hack, resource editing (Darkness, Keys, Nectar, Ambrosia), and more. Supports latest version on Steam and Epic Games Store. For educational purposes only.
